name: Légifrance MCP Server
what_it_does: Légifrance MCP server enabling AI agents to query the official French government legal database — searching statutes, regulations, case law (jurisprudence), administrative circulars, and official publications from Légifrance (the French government's legal information service). Enables AI-assisted legal research and compliance work for French and EU law.
use_cases: Searching French law articles and statutes from legal research agents
Finding relevant jurisprudence for French legal questions from legal analysis agents
Checking regulatory compliance with French administrative law from compliance agents
Researching EU regulations as implemented in French law from business compliance agents
Supporting legal practitioners with French law research from assistant agents
not_for: Non-French legal systems (use EU EUR-Lex or country-specific legal databases for other jurisdictions)
Authoritative legal advice — Légifrance data is informational; consult lawyers for legal advice
Non-French-language users without French reading capability
best_when: A French legal practitioner, business compliance team, or researcher needs AI assistance querying French law — Légifrance is the official French government legal database.
avoid_when: You need legal information for non-French jurisdictions. Legal content from Légifrance is authoritative for French law only.

auth.notes: Légifrance PISTE API OAuth2 credentials required. Register at piste.gouv.fr to get client credentials. French government API access requires registration with PISTE (Plateforme d'Intermédiation des Services Territoriaux et Etatiques).

pricing.free_tier_limits: PISTE API access is free for researchers and businesses
pricing.notes: Légifrance data is free to access via the PISTE API. Registration required but free. Official French government open data.

performance.rate_limits: PISTE API rate limits apply; generally sufficient for research use

known_agent_gotchas: PISTE API registration is required — French government process may take time to approve
Legal content is in French — agents must handle French language content
Legal texts can be complex and long — implement appropriate text length handling
Légifrance search requires understanding of French legal document structure (Articles, Codes, etc.)
Community MCP from pylegifrance project — verify API compatibility with current PISTE API version
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. OAuth2 PISTE credentials. Official French government data. Legal queries may be sensitive for compliance purposes. French data residency. RGPD compliant.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. OAuth2. French government API. Legal queries may be sensitive. RGPD compliant. French data residency.
